summary: Operations Layer API Testing (P1-P9) - All 30 tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of Travel Platform Operations Layer covering: P1-Supplier Performance Dashboard, P2-Booking Funnel Analytics, P3-Failover Visibility, P4-Booking Incident Tracking, P5-Supplier Debugging Tools, P6-Real-Time Alerting, P7-Voucher Pipeline, P8-OPS Admin Panel, P9-Operations Metrics (Prometheus). All endpoints working correctly with proper authentication (agency_admin role required).
passed_tests: Auth Check: 6 ops endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
P1: GET /api/ops/suppliers/performance/dashboard - returns 5 suppliers with latency, error_rate, timeout_rate, confirmation_success_rate, failover_frequency
P1: GET /api/ops/suppliers/performance/timeseries/{supplier_code} - returns 2 time buckets with latency data
P2: GET /api/ops/suppliers/funnel/analytics - returns 8 funnel stages with conversion rates, 4 total bookings
P2: GET /api/ops/suppliers/funnel/timeseries - returns 1 time bucket with funnel data
P3: GET /api/ops/suppliers/failover/dashboard - returns 5 circuit states, 1 failover summary, health states
P4: GET /api/ops/suppliers/incidents/detect - detects 2 issues (stuck bookings, failed confirmations, payment mismatches)
P4: POST /api/ops/suppliers/incidents - creates incident with unique ID, status=open
P4: GET /api/ops/suppliers/incidents - lists 11 incidents
P4: POST /api/ops/suppliers/incidents/{id}/resolve - resolves incident with status=resolved
P4: POST /api/ops/suppliers/incidents/recovery/force-state/{booking_id} - force state change applied to orch-1773344214
P5: GET /api/ops/suppliers/debug/interactions - lists debug logs (0 in window)
P5: POST /api/ops/suppliers/debug/replay/{trace_id} - dry_run mode returns trace_not_found for fake trace
P6: GET /api/ops/suppliers/alerts - lists alerts (0 active)
P6: POST /api/ops/suppliers/alerts/evaluate - evaluates alert rules (0 fired)
P6: POST /api/ops/suppliers/alerts/config - configures slack webhook and email recipients
P6: POST /api/ops/suppliers/alerts/{id}/acknowledge - endpoint working (no active alerts)
P6: POST /api/ops/suppliers/alerts/{id}/resolve - endpoint working (no active alerts)
P7: GET /api/ops/suppliers/vouchers/pipeline - returns 13 vouchers in pipeline
P7: POST /api/ops/suppliers/vouchers - creates voucher with status=pending
P7: POST /api/ops/suppliers/vouchers/{id}/generate - generates voucher with 1878 bytes HTML (MOCKED PDF as base64 HTML)
P7: POST /api/ops/suppliers/vouchers/{id}/send - queues email to test@example.com (MOCKED - queued to DB)
P7: POST /api/ops/suppliers/vouchers/retry-failed - retried 1 failed voucher
P8: GET /api/ops/suppliers/admin/booking/{id} - inspects booking orch-1773344214 with 1 orchestration run
P8: POST /api/ops/suppliers/admin/supplier/{code}/override - circuit_open/circuit_close for mock_hotel
P8: POST /api/ops/suppliers/admin/supplier/{code}/manual-failover - failover from mock_hotel to mock_tour
P8: POST /api/ops/suppliers/admin/price-override - price override applied (15000.0 -> 15000.0)
P8: GET /api/ops/suppliers/admin/audit-log - returns 24 audit log entries
P9: GET /api/ops/suppliers/metrics - JSON metrics (4 total bookings, error_rate=0.0)
P9: GET /api/ops/suppliers/metrics/prometheus - Prometheus text format with HELP, TYPE, ops_bookings_total, ops_error_rate metrics
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All 30 API endpoints working correctly with proper response structures
Good: Authentication (JWT Bearer token) required for all ops endpoints
Good: Comprehensive incident tracking with create/list/resolve lifecycle
Good: Full voucher pipeline with create/generate/send/retry workflow
Good: Prometheus metrics in correct exposition format for monitoring integration
Good: Circuit breaker and failover mechanisms working correctly
Good: Audit logging captures all admin actions (24 entries in test)
Note: Voucher PDF rendering is MOCKED (base64 HTML encoding, not real PDF)
Note: Email delivery is MOCKED (queued to DB, not actually sent)
Note: Slack webhook dispatch exists but uses stub URL (no real Slack integration)
Note: Debug interactions empty (no supplier calls logged in test window)
seed_data_creation: Test data created during test execution: incidents, vouchers, alerts. Used existing booking orch-1773344214 for admin operations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operations Layer API (P1-P9) fully tested in iteration 67. All 30 endpoints working correctly. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_ops_supplier_operations_iter67.py. Auth uses agency_admin role (agent@acenta.test). Mocked components: Voucher PDF (base64 HTML), Email delivery (queued to DB), Slack webhooks (stub). Preview URL: https://ddd-router-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Previous supplier ecosystem tests in iteration 66 (23/23 passed).

mocked_apis_list: Voucher PDF rendering (base64 HTML encoding instead of real PDF)
Email delivery (queued to ops_email_queue collection, not sent)
mocked_apis.notes: All mocked components are intentional for development/testing. Production would integrate real PDF generation (weasyprint/wkhtmltopdf), email service, and Slack API.
